<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]][[ko:л≥СмЮР]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]][[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]][[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]][[ko:л≥СмЮР]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]][[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]][[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]][[de:Feuer-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de feu]][[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]][[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]][[ko:л≥СмЮР]][[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]][[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]][[za:Bingjceij]][[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]][[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]][[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=дЄЩе≠Р|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=b«Рngz«Р|w=ping-tz≈≠|mi=p ∞i≈Л¬≤¬є ts…®|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=p…™≈Л tsi|mc=p√¶≈Л tЌ°si|oc-bs=pra≈Л tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as дЄЩе≠Р''' (hinoene (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanonezumi (дЄЩе≠Р), heikanone (дЄЩе≠Р), heishi (дЄЩе≠Р)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|дєЩдЇ•|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=зЫЄеЙЛ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: heishi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (л≥СмЮР)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ

<!--
==
* Yang Fire Rat (дЄЩе≠Р) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): b«Рngz«Р
** Cantonese (Jyutping): beng2 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: гБ≤гБЃгБИгБ≠ (hinoe-ne)
***Onyomi: гБЄгБДгБЛгБЃгБ≠ (heika-no-ne)
***Onyomi: гБЄгБДгБЧ (heishi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): byeongja
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): B√≠nh T√љ

-->
==Years of Yang Fire Rat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 16 when divided by 60 is a Besshi {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Besshi (дЄЩе≠РгБЃеєі)'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}}
!! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}}
!! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 16|en|AD 16|WD=Q23763|lt=16 AD|1=AD 16}}
* {{ill|AD 76|en|AD 76|WD=Q24845|lt=76 AD|1=AD 76}}
* {{ill|AD 136|en|AD 136|WD=Q34237|lt=136 AD|1=AD 136}}
* {{ill|196|en|196|WD=Q31542|lt=196 AD|1=196}}
* {{ill|256|en|256|WD=Q31712|lt=256 AD|1=256}}
* {{ill|316|en|316|WD=Q31894|lt=316 AD|1=316}}
* {{ill|376|en|376|WD=Q48040|lt=376 AD|1=376}}
* {{ill|436|en|436|WD=Q33301|lt=436 AD|1=436}}
* {{ill|496|en|496|WD=Q30052|lt=496 AD|1=496}}
* {{ill|556|en|556|WD=Q32224|lt=556 AD|1=556}}
* {{ill|616|en|616|WD=Q33263|lt=616 AD|1=616}}
* {{ill|676|en|676|WD=Q31098|lt=676 AD|1=676}}
* {{ill|736|en|736|WD=Q23581|lt=736 AD|1=736}}
* {{ill|796|en|796|WD=Q33452|lt=796 AD|1=796}}
* {{ill|856|en|856|WD=Q30370|lt=856 AD|1=856}}
* {{ill|916|en|916|WD=Q24886|lt=916 AD|1=916}}
* {{ill|976|en|976|WD=Q23782|lt=976 AD|1=976}}
|
* {{ill|1036|en|1036|WD=Q19328|lt=1036 AD|1=1036}}
* {{ill|1096|en|1096|WD=Q19485|lt=1096 AD|1=1096}}
* {{ill|1156|en|1156|WD=Q19653|lt=1156 AD|1=1156}}
* {{ill|1216|en|1216|WD=Q5373|lt=1216 AD|1=1216}}
* {{ill|1276|en|1276|WD=Q5530|lt=1276 AD|1=1276}}
* {{ill|1336|en|1336|WD=Q6028|lt=1336 AD|1=1336}}
* {{ill|1396|en|1396|WD=Q6405|lt=1396 AD|1=1396}}
* {{ill|1456|en|1456|WD=Q6517|lt=1456 AD|1=1456}}
* {{ill|1516|en|1516|WD=Q6212|lt=1516 AD|1=1516}}
* {{ill|1576|en|1576|WD=Q6700|lt=1576 AD|1=1576}}
* {{ill|1636|en|1636|WD=Q6885|lt=1636 AD|1=1636}}
* {{ill|1696|en|1696|WD=Q7699|lt=1696 AD|1=1696}}
* {{ill|1756|en|1756|WD=Q7632|lt=1756 AD|1=1756}}
* {{ill|1816|en|1816|WD=Q6953|lt=1816 AD|1=1816}}
* {{ill|1876|en|1876|WD=Q7766|lt=1876 AD|1=1876}}
* {{ill|1936|en|1936|WD=Q18649|lt=1936 AD|1=1936}}
* {{ill|1996|en|1996|WD=Q2070|lt=1996 AD|1=1996}}
|
* {{ill|2056 AD|ja|2056еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2056|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2056 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2116 AD|ja|2116еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2116|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2116 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22дЄЦзіА|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2176 AD|ja|2176еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2176|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2176 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22дЄЦзіА|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2236 AD|ja|2236еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2236|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2236 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23дЄЦзіА|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2296 AD|ja|2296еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2296|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2296 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23дЄЦзіА|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2356 AD|ja|2356еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2356|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2356 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2416 AD|ja|2416еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2416|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2416 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2476 AD|ja|2476еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2476|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2476 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2536 AD|ja|2536еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2536|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2536 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2596 AD|ja|2596еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2596|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2596 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2656 AD|ja|2656еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2656|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2656 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2716 AD|ja|2716еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2716|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2716 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2776 AD|ja|2776еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2776|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2776 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2836 AD|ja|2836еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2836|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2836 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2896 AD|ja|2896еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2896|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2896 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2956 AD|ja|2956еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2956|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2956 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|lt=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|2=ja|3=еЈ±|4=zh|5=еЈ±|1=Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (еЈ±)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Hando|lt_ja=е§ІеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} period.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:P√™ng-ch√Їn]]
[[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Fire Rat|qq=ja|дЄЩе≠Р|version=86099640|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:B√Ѓng-cбє≥ћДde]]
[[nds:Holt-R√ґttvi]]
[[de:Yang Fire Rat]]

[[ja:дЄЩе≠Р]]
[[zh:дЄЩе≠Р]]
[[ko:л≥СмЮР]]
[[fr:Rat de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Ratte]]

[[af:Vuurrat (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Ratteen]]
[[en:Fire Rat]]
[[fr:Rat de feushak]]
[[it:Bing-chбє≥ћБid]]

[[vi:B√≠nh T√љ]]
[[za:Bingceij]]
[[ar:Yang Fire Rat]]

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]]
[[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]]
[[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]]
[[za:Bingjceij]]
[[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]]
[[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurrot (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:BƒЂng-cбє≥ћД]]
[[hak:Pi√°ng-chбє≥ћБ]]
[[nds:F√Љ√Љr-R√ґtt]]
[[za:Bingjceij]]
[[zh-min-nan:P√©ng-ch√Ї]]
[[zh-yue:дЄЩе≠Р]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062017}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
